examples.title: Algorithm: Vector Implementation
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Vector
INPUT: initialCapacity
OUTPUT: Vector object

BEGIN
 IF initialCapacity > 0 THEN
 CREATE array of size initialCapacity
 ELSE
 CREATE array of default size
 END IF

 DEFINE method add(element)
 IF array is full THEN
 RESIZE array to double its size
 END IF
 ADD element to end of array
 END method

 DEFINE method insertElementAt(element, index)
 SHIFT elements at and after index to the right
 INSERT element at index
 END method

 DEFINE method setSize(size)
 IF size > array size THEN
 RESIZE array to size
 ELSE IF size < array size THEN
 TRIM array to size
 END IF
 END method
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the Vector class operations like add, insertElementAt, and setSize.
